description: Change time_stop_minutes_before_close from 10 (=15:50 ET) to 20 (=15:40 ET). Exit runners 10 minutes earlier to avoid 0DTE theta crush in final minutes of trading.

sweep_summary.note: Full 6-point sweep IS+OOS. n=246 IS and n=17 OOS constant across all variants (time stop only affects exit timing, not entry count).

candidate_params.description: Exit all open 0DTE positions at 15:40 ET (20 min before close) instead of 15:50 ET

correct_baseline_params.note: L108+L109+L110 dead-knob fixes applied. Production-correct baseline.

walk_forward.note: WF=0.86 is in the clean generalization zone. 15-min candidate WF=0.41 fails (IS overfit). 20-min is the sweet spot.

sub_window_stability.note: Tariff shock, recovery, and ex-April (pre-tariff) all improve. No regime-conditional artifact.

mechanism: 0DTE options experience exponential theta decay in the final 15-30 minutes before close. Runners that survive to 15:40 ET still have residual premium that erodes sharply between 15:40-15:50. Exiting at 15:40 consistently captures more of this premium vs waiting for 15:50 time stop. The 15-min candidate (15:45) over-tilts IS (+$1,059) while the 20-min (15:40) achieves IS/OOS balance.

implementation.note: Also update automation/state/aggressive/params.json for dual-account symmetry (C9). EOD flatten tasks (Gamma_EodFlatten + Gamma_EodFlatten_Aggressive) run at 15:55 ET - no scheduling conflict.

overall_verdict: PASS - NEEDS J DECISION (evidence_n=17 < 20). WF=0.86, all 4 sub-windows HELP. Mechanism is the well-known 0DTE theta crush in final minutes. Recommend J approve time_stop_minutes_before_close: 20 in both params.json files.
lessons: L110 (time_stop_et parameterized in simulate_trade_real, enabling this sweep)
